Container.Name: Rackula
Container.Overview: Drag and drop rack visualizer for your homelab. Plan your rack layout by dragging devices in, moving them around, and exporting the result. Real device images, PNG/PDF/SVG export, and QR code sharing — your layout lives in a URL. Supports persistent storage via the Rackula API sidecar container (my-Rackula-API). Install and start the Rackula-API container first, then start this container.
Container.Requires: Rackula-API container must be running first

Config.Name: API_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname of the Rackula API container (must match the container name of the Rackula-API container)

Config.Name: API_PORT
Config.Description: Port the Rackula API listens on (must match RACKULA_API_PORT in the Rackula-API container)

Config.Name: API_WRITE_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional secret token to protect API write (PUT/DELETE) routes. Must match RACKULA_API_WRITE_TOKEN in the Rackula-API container.
